title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for interacting with the Ollama server; chat, embed, pull, and manage models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via a lightweight wrapper.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package adding Ollama chat, embed, and completion endpoints as first-class components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI) offering ChatGPT-like interface and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; generate, chat, and pull models from Ruby scripts or Rails apps.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built Rust CLI that wraps Ollama with extra helpers like prompt templates and shell piping.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s chat sidebar.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes, Raspberry Pi, AWS Lambda, and more.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) with multi-arch support and example compose stacks.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama server and CLI, enabling reproducible installs on NixOS.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial async Rust crate for Ollama’s REST API with Tokio and Serde.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library generated from Ollama’s OpenAPI spec; chat, pull, and generate.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app adding Ollama chat and embed endpoints with admin UI and REST serializers.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI wrapper that exposes OpenAI-style endpoints backed by Ollama for drop-in replacement.
